description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and graphic lettering on the front FittingComfortWash care Machine wash in warm water with like colours only Use non-chlorine bleach when needed Tumble dry low Do not iron if decorated Do not dry clean if decorated Indulge the death metal fan in you with this black megadeth t-shirt from free authority. The band name lettering on the front is both simple and edgy giving a dangerous vibe to the tee. Team this with denims, leather boots and a motorcycle jacket for a total bad boy look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
